profile.name: Jean Carlos Murillo Vásquez
profile.headline: Full-Stack Software Engineer | .NET | React | SQL | AI-Enabled Solutions
profile.summary: Experienced and versatile Full-Stack Software Engineer with over 10 years in the IT industry, with a strong focus on .NET development, SQL, and data engineering. Proven ability to design and develop scalable web applications, RESTful APIs, and data-driven solutions across cloud and on-premises environments. Experienced in building end-to-end systems, integrating backend services, databases, and modern web technologies. Strong communicator with experience collaborating with product managers, architects, and stakeholders to deliver high-quality, production-grade software solutions.
highlights: .NET and SQL engineering
AI and RAG integrations
Cloud and DevOps delivery
Power Platform consulting

feedItems.title: Professional Summary
feedItems.body: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience building scalable web applications, RESTful APIs, data-driven platforms, and end-to-end business solutions across cloud and on-premises environments.

feedItems.title: AI and Data Engineering Focus
feedItems.body: Hands-on experience integrating Large Language Models, Retrieval-Augmented Generation architectures, ETL pipelines, data lakes, SQL optimization, and analytics-driven systems using modern engineering practices.

feedItems.title: Cloud, DevOps, and Delivery
feedItems.body: Experienced with Azure, AWS, GCP, CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, production deployments, monitoring, and collaboration with architects, product managers, and stakeholders.

widgets.title: Primary Stack
widgets.description: .NET, ReactJS, SQL Server, Azure, RESTful APIs, and enterprise integration work.

widgets.title: AI and Automation
widgets.description: LLM integration, RAG solutions, prompt engineering, Copilot-assisted workflows, and Power Platform delivery.

widgets.title: Availability
widgets.description: Open to full-stack engineering, consulting, integration, and cloud modernization work.

experience.summary: Designing and delivering backend services, AI-enabled solutions, financial integrations, and production-ready full-stack systems for client needs.
highlights: Build RESTful APIs and backend services using .NET (C#) for financial and transactional integrations.
Implement AI-driven features using Large Language Models such as Claude and GPT-4.
Build Retrieval-Augmented Generation solutions integrating SharePoint and database sources.
Design BCCR integrations, distributed POS data synchronization, and relational database optimization.
Set up CI/CD and manage deployments across Vercel and Google Cloud Platform environments.

experience.summary: Focused on DevOps, Azure integrations, Power Platform extensibility, and infrastructure automation for enterprise solutions.
highlights: Designed, implemented, and maintained CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps.
Developed Azure Functions and custom SDK integrations for Power Platform using .NET (C#).
Built RESTful APIs and backend services for financial and transactional integrations.
Automated Azure provisioning with Terraform and improved security, performance, and operational stability.
Implemented monitoring, logging, and alerting with Azure Monitor, Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack.

experience.summary: Built full-stack business applications and enterprise integrations across .NET, Java, Angular, ReactJS, and SQL technologies.
highlights: Designed full-stack web applications with .NET, Java, and ReactJS.
Led CI/CD integration through Azure DevOps.
Worked with Angular 5, .NET Core, Entity Framework Core, and Web API controllers.
Created database objects including stored procedures, functions, views, and triggers.
Developed WCF services, asynchronous web services, unit tests, and technical requirements documents.

experience.summary: Led data engineering and enterprise software initiatives spanning data lakes, analytics platforms, automation, and architecture design.
highlights: Led the technical design and implementation of enterprise Data Lake solutions using SQL Server, Cosmos DB, MongoDB, SSIS, and Apache Spark.
Designed and maintained big data pipelines and data processing workflows for ingestion, transformation, and analytics.
Developed data-driven applications and data models using .NET, ReactJS, and Erwin.
Built RPA automation using UiPath and integrated CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps and Jenkins.
Defined architecture, technical designs, and implementation strategies while guiding cross-functional delivery teams.

experience.summary: Worked on Web API development, JavaScript coding, SQL programming, and asynchronous application delivery in ASP.NET MVC environments.
highlights: Focused on Web API development, JavaScript coding, and SQL programming.
Built and tested web services and asynchronous applications.
Developed software on ASP.NET MVC and jQuery-based interfaces.
Used Team Foundation Server and created database objects such as stored procedures, functions, views, and triggers.

experience.summary: Delivered full-stack .NET applications, SQL components, asynchronous services, and technical documentation in Microsoft-centric environments.
highlights: Created full-stack .NET applications and database components.
Developed software on ASP.NET MVC and wrote jQuery code.
Built database objects, WCF services, and asynchronous web services.
Worked with Team Foundation Server and technical requirements documentation.

experience.summary: Worked on regulatory data solutions, SQL Server reporting services, bug analysis, and backend service development.
highlights: Developed data classes according to SUGEF requirements.
Worked with TortoiseSVN, bug analysis, and jQuery development.
Built stored procedures, functions, views, triggers, and WCF services.
Used SQL Server SSAS, SSIS, and SSRS while preparing technical requirements.

projects.name: Portfolio and Code Samples
projects.description: Central portfolio presence focused on enterprise software delivery, integrations, cloud deployments, and modern full-stack engineering practices.
highlights: GitHub portfolio available at github.com/glimo17.
Experience building RESTful APIs, financial integrations, enterprise web apps, and AI-enabled software.
Production experience across cloud and on-premises systems with strong delivery ownership.

projects.name: AI, Data, and Automation Solutions
projects.description: Portfolio specialization spanning LLM integrations, RAG pipelines, ETL systems, Power Platform implementations, and data engineering solutions.
highlights: LLM integration with Claude, ChatGPT, and AI-assisted development workflows.
RAG architectures using external data sources including SharePoint and relational databases.
Power Automate, Power Apps, Dataverse, plugins, PCF controls, and SharePoint integration.

certifications.name: MCPS: Programming in HTML5 with JavaScript and CSS3
